queries.description: It is not possible to reason about the behaviour of any program that contains instances of undefined behaviour, which can cause unpredictable results that are particularly difficult to detect during testing.
queries.name: There shall be no occurrence of undefined behaviour

queries.description: Critical unspecified behaviour impacts the observable behaviour of the abstract machine and means a program is not guaranteed to behave predictably.
queries.name: There shall be no occurrence of critical unspecified behaviour

queries.description: It is not possible to reason about the behaviour of any program that contains instances of undefined behaviour, which can cause unpredictable results that are particularly difficult to detect during testing.
queries.name: Audit: there shall be no occurrence of undefined behaviour

queries.description: Critical unspecified behaviour impacts the observable behaviour of the abstract machine and means a program is not guaranteed to behave predictably.
queries.name: Audit: there shall be no occurrence of critical unspecified behaviour

queries.description: Threads accessing the same memory location concurrently without utilization of thread synchronization objects results in undefined behavior.
queries.name: Data races between threads lead to undefined behavior

queries.description: Casting to an enumeration value outside the range of the enumeration's values results in critical unspecified behavior.
queries.name: Out-of-range enumeration cast leads to critical unspecified behavior

RULE-4-1-3.title: There shall be no occurrence of undefined or critical unspecified behaviour
